summary: Next earnings: May 1, 2026 (before market open, confirmed). EPS consensus estimate: $0.92/share — a 57.8% decline YoY. Chevron has beaten Zacks Consensus in 4 straight quarters with avg surprise of 5.6%. Revenue expected to decline YoY as well.
